commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=1d7ee73e2170bb2adb887bdb62549a94a5c35254)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a `web-app-smoke` provider recommendation use case with aliases, provider-neutral scoring over existing reachability/evidence/lifecycle signals, tests, docs, and a CHANGELOG entry.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new CLI recommendation use case rather than a bug report. The relevant verification is source/diff inspection plus the PR-listed focused Go tests and `go run` commands.
commands.review_followup: - This maintainer-member draft needs normal maintainer review and removal of a release-owned CHANGELOG edit rather than cleanup closure or automated repair-lane work.

target.title: feat(providers): recommend web app smoke
target.body:
## Summary
- add `crabbox providers recommend web-app-smoke` for app and service smoke workflows
- rank provider-native URLs, SSH tunnels, tailnet reachability, browser/code/desktop access, reusable sessions, retained outputs, sync, and cleanup
- document aliases like `web-smoke`, `app-smoke`, `service-smoke`, and `browser-smoke`

## Verification
- `git diff --check`
- `go test -count=1 ./internal/cli -run 'TestProvidersRecommend(WebAppSmoke|BrowserSmokeAlias|ListsUseCases)'`
- `go test -race -count=1 ./internal/cli -run 'TestProvidersRecommend(WebAppSmoke|BrowserSmokeAlias)'`
- `go test -count=1 ./internal/cli`
- `scripts/check-docs.sh`
- `go run ./cmd/crabbox providers recommend web-app-smoke --json`
- `go run ./cmd/crabbox providers recommend browser-smoke --limit 1 --json`
- `go run ./cmd/crabbox providers recommend web-app-smoke --reachability provider-url --limit 3 --json`

## Notes
- This is provider-neutral recommendation logic over existing reachability, evidence, and lifecycle signals. It does not require live provider credentials.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
